demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My foot is screaming in pain, I have to sleep with it hanging off the side of the bed just to tolerate it, and now my toe is turning black.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain in my foot won't stop and it's stopping me sleeping, and today my big toe has gone black — I don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: the leg pain has been building for a couple of weeks, but the constant rest pain and the black toe are new
symptom_narrative.duration: about two weeks of getting rapidly worse; the toe went black today
symptom_narrative.character: excruciating, relentless pain in the foot and toes; the foot feels perishingly cold
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever had — I can't sleep, it's agony
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the toes and foot of the left leg, and the calf when I try to walk
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, all through the night; it used to only hurt when I walked
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: the only thing that helps is hanging my foot off the side of the bed — letting it dangle down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat or putting my foot up on a pillow makes it far worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a deep sore has opened up on the side of my ankle that won't heal, and the tip of my big toe has gone black and hard; the foot looks pale and shiny
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had cramping in that calf when walking for a long time — it would ease if I stopped and rested — but never pain like this at rest
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't walk more than about ten metres now, and I haven't slept properly in days because of the pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: poor circulation in the legs — I get cramping in the calf when I walk
past_medical_history.how_managed: on tablets for it for a while

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; has a chair next to the bed so the leg can hang down at night; profoundly sleep-deprived from the pain

objective_data_offered.value: the tip of the left big toe is black, hard and dried-out looking
a deep, punched-out sore on the outer side of the left ankle that isn't healing
the left foot looks pale and shiny; when hung down over the edge of the bed it turns a dusky red colour
the foot feels perishingly cold to touch compared with the other side
no fever, no shivering or shakes, and the black toe is not hot, wet, oozing or smelly
